name: Gorgonzola Cream Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a saucepan over medium heat.
2. Add flour to the melted butter and whisk until smooth.
3. Gradually add milk to the mixture while continuing to whisk, ensuring it thickens.
4. Once the sauce has thickened, remove from heat.
5. Stir in gorgonzola cheese until fully melted and incorporated into the sauce.
